summary: Frontend testing of new subscription page and admin distance sorting features. All 8 requested features verified: 1) /subscription route exists and redirects to login when not authenticated (expected), 2) Landing page loads correctly, 3) App.tsx has Subscription route inside PrivateRoute (lines 225-231), 4) ClientDashboard subscription button points to /subscription (line 936), 5) AdminDashboard has haversine distance functions (lines 87-110), 6) AdminDashboard smart assign shows washers sorted by distance with km labels (lines 3001-3044), 7) No 'voisin' word found in any .tsx/.ts files, 8) Subscription.tsx has 4-step form with AddressAutocomplete and data-testid attributes.

minor.issue: Returns 403 in preview env - Supabase API key may be invalid (expected per agent context)

passed_tests: Landing page loads on desktop (1920x1080) with French content
/subscription route exists and redirects to /select-dashboard when not authenticated (expected behavior)
App.tsx has Subscription lazy import (line 65) and route inside PrivateRoute (lines 225-231)
AdminDashboard.tsx smart assign section shows washers sorted by distance with km labels (lines 3001-3044)
No occurrences of 'voisin' or 'voisins' in any .tsx/.ts files in /app/src/
Subscription.tsx has 4-step form (step state, PLANS, DAYS, SLOTS)
Subscription.tsx has proper data-testid attributes (subscription-form, plan-*, formula-*, day-*, slot-*, next-step-btn, prev-step-btn, submit-subscription-btn)

subscription_route.details: Line 65: lazy import, Lines 225-231: Route inside PrivateRoute

admin_haversine_functions.details: Lines 87-93: haversineKm function, Lines 95-111: getWashersSortedByDistance function

admin_smart_assign_ui.details: Lines 3001-3044: Smart assign section with distance sorting, km labels, color coding (<5km green, <15km amber, >15km red)

subscription_page_structure.details: 4-step form (step 1: plan, step 2: weight/formula, step 3: schedule, step 4: address/confirm), AddressAutocomplete integration, proper data-testid attributes

critical_code_review_comments: Good: Subscription.tsx has proper 4-step wizard with clear progression
Good: AddressAutocomplete integration validates addresses before submission
Good: haversineKm uses standard Haversine formula for accurate distance calculation
Good: getWashersSortedByDistance handles null coordinates gracefully
Good: Smart assign UI shows distance with color coding for quick visual assessment
Good: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.backend: N/A - Supabase API key invalid in preview env

test_credentials: No credentials needed - tested public pages and code verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified: 1) /subscription page with 4-step form and AddressAutocomplete, 2) AdminDashboard haversine distance sorting for washer assignment, 3) ClientDashboard subscription button updated to /subscription, 4) No 'voisin' word in codebase. Cannot test authenticated flows due to invalid Supabase API key in preview env.
